sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24675" key="diagwnismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διᾰγων-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a great straining,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς κοιλίας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.30</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
